race.comment: CHESTIME (4) was in the money two starts back at Beaumont (Newcastle) but couldn't back it up last time when eighth over 1300m at Dubbo. Finds an easier assignment and can get the job done.OUR WARRIOR (7) had been in top form landing two consecutive wins but last start missed the frame when fifth over 1150m at Beaumont (Newcastle). Won't find this as tough. Leading player. TOP ACT (8) is one worth including at odds. Comes here third up and ready to peak. STEEL CLAWS (14) has an extra run under the belt. Fourth up and racing well. No reason to think that changes against these. Very competitive.
